case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. JOSE URIEL GUERRERO RODRIGUEZ

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-05-2016 - JUDGMENT.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,390.47 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. (FORMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL CORP.) AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JOSE URIEL GUERRERO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-05-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
